mapper.select: SELECT b.banner_id, b.title, b.image_type, b.link_type, b.link_value, b.display_order, b.start_date, b.end_date, DATE_FORMAT(b.updated_at, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS img_ver, CASE WHEN b.link_type = 'STORE' THEN s.store_name WHEN b.link_type = 'COUPON' THEN c.coupon_name ELSE NULL END AS link_target_name, CASE WHEN b.link_type = 'COUPON' THEN c.store_id ELSE NULL END AS coupon_store_id FROM tb_banner b LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON b.link_type = 'STORE' AND b.link_value REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND s.store_id = CAST(b.link_value AS UNSIGNED) LEFT JOIN tb_coupon c ON b.link_type = 'COUPON' AND b.link_value REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND c.coupon_id = CAST(b.link_value AS UNSIGNED) WHERE b.is_active = 1 AND b.is_deleted = 0 AND (b.start_date IS NULL OR b.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (b.end_date IS NULL OR b.end_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY b.display_order ASC, b.created_at DESC

SELECT s.store_id, s.region_id, s.store_name, s.category, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, s.description, s.emoji, s.rating_avg, s.status, s.latitude, s.longitude, DATE_FORMAT(s.updated_at, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS img_ver, r.region_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_review rv WHERE rv.store_id = s.store_id AND rv.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rv.is_deleted = 0) AS review_count FROM tb_store s LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id
ORDER BY s.rating_avg DESC, s.store_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
